summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of the rebuilt Shop page with 4 new products. All features working correctly including product cards, Quick View modal, Product Detail Page with image gallery, tabs, quantity selector, Add to Cart, breadcrumb navigation, and 'You May Also Like' related products section.
passed_tests: Shop page (/shop) loads with hero section and 'Our Products' heading
4 product cards displayed: handstand-canes, fingerboard, peg-board, parallettes
Product card: Handstand Canes (60 CM) - ₹7,999 - 4.9 rating (28 reviews)
Product card: Fingerboard (Two-Stones Style) - ₹4,999 - 4.8 rating (42 reviews)
Product card: Peg Board (4ft x 2ft) - ₹4,999 - 4.7 rating (19 reviews)
Product card: Parallettes - ₹1,799 - 4.9 rating (64 reviews) with 'BEST SELLER' badge
Product cards show correct names, prices, taglines, and star ratings
Add to Cart buttons present on all product cards
Quick View buttons appear on hover for all products
Clicking product name navigates to /shop/{productId} detail page
Product Detail Page: Breadcrumb navigation (Shop > Product Name)
Product Detail Page: Main image with 3 thumbnails gallery
Product Detail Page: Thumbnail click changes main image
Product Detail Page: Product title, tagline, rating, price displayed
Product Detail Page: Features list with checkmarks
Product Detail Page: Quantity selector (-, value, +) works correctly
Product Detail Page: Add to Cart button works with success state
Product Detail Page: Stock status 'In Stock - Ships within 2-3 days'
Product Detail Page: Trust badges (Free Shipping 3K+, Quality Assured, Easy Returns)
Product Detail Page: Tabs (Description, Specifications, Uses) switch content
Product Detail Page: 'You May Also Like' section shows other 3 products
Quick View modal opens with product image, thumbnails, details, features
Quick View modal: Add to Cart button works with toast notification
Quick View modal: View Details button navigates to product detail page
Breadcrumb 'Shop' link navigates back to /shop
Related products clickable and navigate to correct detail pages
Cart count updates in header after adding items
Toast notifications appear for Add to Cart actions
Floating cart button visible on shop and detail pages
context_for_next_testing_agent: Shop page completely rebuilt with 4 products from products.js data file. Products: handstand-canes (₹7,999), fingerboard (₹4,999), peg-board (₹4,999), parallettes (₹1,799 - Best Seller). Product Detail Page route: /shop/:productId. All data-testids working: product-card-{id}, product-name-{id}, add-to-cart-{id}, quick-view-{id}, product-breadcrumb, product-detail-title, product-detail-price, product-main-image, product-thumbnails, product-thumb-{idx}, quantity-decrease, quantity-value, quantity-increase, product-add-to-cart, tab-description, tab-specifications, tab-uses, related-products, related-{id}, floating-cart-btn, modal-add-to-cart, modal-view-details. Cart functionality uses CartContext with localStorage persistence.
